subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-04-01 in Stuttgart
subcodes.first_line: Behold what the grace and bounty of Baha'u'llah have done! Observe where we are and where you are
subcodes.first_line_orig: ببینید فضل و عنایت حضرت بهآءالله چه کرده ما کجا و شما کجا چگونه ما را در یک بساط
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @growth of the Cause, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @unity; oneness of humanity, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
